component_valuation.coverage_statement: SAFE stake, MD&A monetizing assets, residual Magnolia/Asbury carrying, cash, senior debt, fee reserve, and residual optionality are valued once.

valuation.evidence: FACT spin/merger mark: SAFE closed $25.80 on 2023-03-31 (Yahoo; post 0.16 split on merger day), ~$25/share round number. At 13,525,499 implied shares that is $338.1M = $27.99/STHO share vs current Yahoo SAFE $16.93 → $18.95/STHO share (about -32% below deal mark). FACT Q1 10-Q Note 7: ~13.5M shares / 18.8%, FV $183.0M at $13.53 on 2026-03-31. INFERENCE: SAFE owns long-duration ground leases (typically ~99-year; IR decks cite ~91–92 year weighted-average extended lease term), so the equity mark is rate-sensitive — lower discount rates support re-rating toward/above the deal mark. JUDGMENT cases: low ~$12 SAFE forced sale; base near current mark with friction; high ~$25 deal-mark path. Margin Loan $92.8M first-priority pledge (Note 9).

components.label: External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction

valuation.evidence: FACT Note 1: annual auto-renewal each March 31; terminate without cause with ≥180 days notice and ≥2/3 independent trustee vote. Before 2027-03-31, termination fee = $55M minus fees paid (≈$5M overhang after $50M paid through 2026-03-31). After 2027-03-31, that termination-fee trigger no longer applies to without-cause terminations under the disclosed formula. FACT current term fee $7.5M; thereafter 2% GBV ex-SAFE. JUDGMENT: H2 2026 is the practical window to run a manager RFP so a replacement can be effective at/after the 2027-03-31 fee cliff — not an immediate free option today. Safe Governance Agreement still restricts certain SAFE-share transfers. Cash taxes de minimis (DTA allowance to zero; $0.2M paid in 2025).

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The recovery range applies haircuts to the disclosed loans, AFS securities, land, and properties; the base case relies on repayment and land-sale evidence while zero-carry claims receive no value here.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Realization is modeled through the five-year wind-down horizon, with specific sale and repayment timing remaining uncertain.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental development capital is attributed to this monetizing bucket; sale costs and wind-down friction are deducted separately in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

component_groups.label: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
component_groups.economic_claim: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
component_groups.valuation_basis: Base applies a material realization haircut to carrying; high approaches carrying; low assumes slow/distressed sales.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The base case gives partial credit to carrying value because 2023 through Q1 2026 land and lot sales exceeded cost of sales, while the low case allows slow or distressed realization and the high case approaches carrying.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Land and operating-real-estate realization is modeled over the five-year wind-down horizon; no immediate sale of the remaining operating real estate is assumed.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: The component is valued after its carrying-value haircut; no separate development budget is added, and fee and sale-friction deductions remain in wind_down_fee_and_friction_reserve.

component_groups.label: Cash and restricted cash
component_groups.valuation_basis: Cash is near carrying; low allows modest restricted-cash leakage.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

component_groups.label: Safe Credit Facility and Margin Loan Facility
component_groups.economic_claim: Safe Credit Facility and Margin Loan Facility
component_groups.valuation_basis: Low allows PIK accretion / incremental draws; high assumes modest paydown from sales.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

component_groups.label: External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction
component_groups.economic_claim: External management fees, termination overhang, and sale friction
component_groups.valuation_basis: Base ≈ PV of contractual fee path + modest sale friction; low adds early-termination / higher friction.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

component_groups.label: Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option
component_groups.economic_claim: Zero-carry claims and entitlement surplus option
component_groups.valuation_basis: Failure value zero; high credits modest surplus/zero-carry recovery.
component_groups.adjustments: Low/base/high incorporate ownership, financing, tax, and realization adjustments in component evidence.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: The low case assigns zero, the base assigns only $0.20 per share, and the high case requires incremental recovery from zero-carry claims or entitlement surplus beyond Magnolia/Asbury carrying cases.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Any recovery is treated as a contingent result within the five-year wind-down horizon, not as current cash or a contracted asset sale.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: No incremental owner-funded development spend is credited to this option; any continuing holding, entitlement, management, or sale costs are captured in the existing operating and wind-down reserve components.

wisdom_applied: Klarman: book is an anchor; prior -1.19 cash/debt identity was a false bridge.
Greenblatt: finite asset-sale / capital-return event tree.
Horizon Kinetics: market-structure discount on a post-spin orphan.
limitations: Exact integer SAFE share count not disclosed (derived from FV/price).
Numeric margin LTV trigger levels not disclosed in 10-Q.
No asset-level third-party bids for Magnolia/Asbury residual.

judgments.label: Safehold Inc. equity stake (~13.525M shares)
judgments.evidence: FACT spin/merger mark: SAFE closed $25.80 on 2023-03-31 (Yahoo; post 0.16 split on merger day), ~$25/share round number. At 13,525,499 implied shares that is $338.1M = $27.99/STHO share vs current Yahoo SAFE $16.93 → $18.95/STHO share (about -32% below deal mark). FACT Q1 10-Q Note 7: ~13.5M shares / 18.8%, FV $183.0M at $13.53 on 2026-03-31. INFERENCE: SAFE owns long-duration ground leases (typically ~99-year; IR decks cite ~91–92 year weighted-average extended lease term), so the equity mark is rate-sensitive — lower discount rates support re-rating toward/above the deal mark. JUDGMENT cases: low ~$12 SAFE forced sale; base near current mark with friction; high ~$25 deal-mark path. Margin Loan $92.8M first-priority pledge (Note 9).

judgments.label: MD&A monetizing loans, AFS securities, land, other properties
judgments.evidence: FACT Q1 MD&A monetizing portfolio: loan $16.1M + ten AFS debt securities $38.2M + land $14.4M + two properties $2.7M = $71.4M ($5.91/sh). Zero-carry loans/equity interests disclosed with no assurance of recovery. Q1 land-development sales revenue $11.0M / COS $9.3M; Surfhouse mezz $10.6M repaid 3/27/2026 (8-K). Source: 10-Q MD&A; Note 5/6; 8-K 2026-04-01. INFERENCE from 10-K/10-Q land-sale margins: the $14.4M monetizing land sleeve may realize above carrying; loans/AFS remain nearer mark-to-market/par.

judgments.label: Magnolia Green and residual Asbury land / operating real estate
judgments.evidence: FACT YE2025 10-K Note 5 dispositions: land development revenue vs cost of sales 2025 $46.4M / $28.8M (+$17.6M), 2024 $60.0M / $48.7M (+$11.3M), 2023 $72.4M / $62.7M (+$9.7M). FACT Q1 2026: land development revenue $11.0M vs COS $9.3M (+$1.7M). INFERENCE: actively selling land/lots above carrying cost of sales — GAAP book understates realizable value for the monetizing land/development sleeve. FACT Q1 accum. depreciation: RE $28.784M + L&D $10.547M = $39.3M (~$3.26/sh) — upper bound on pure depreciation add-back for depreciable assets; land itself is not depreciated the same way. FACT 10-K: Company did not sell operating real estate (buildings) in 2025 or 2023 — Asbury hotel/ops premium to book is unproven by closed sales. FACT residual carrying after removing MD&A monetizing land/other ≈ $12.72/sh. Sources: 10-K Note 5; 10-Q Notes 4–5; Item 1 Magnolia/Asbury.
